query: SELECT id, firstName, lastName, agentCode FROM agents WHERE firstName IN ('Test', 'Rank', 'GetById', 'Stage') OR agentCode LIKE 'TEST%' OR agentCode LIKE 'RANK%' OR agentCode LIKE 'GETID%' OR agentCode LIKE 'STAGE%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4XhD5JGzFycvBf8.root --database iwEifGeLgtJbCVjTZgrjir --execute SELECT id, firstName, lastName, agentCode FROM agents WHERE firstName IN ('Test', 'Rank', 'GetById', 'Stage') OR agentCode LIKE 'TEST%' OR agentCode LIKE 'RANK%' OR agentCode LIKE 'GETID%' OR agentCode LIKE 'STAGE%'
